purpose: Empty-state placeholder with an illustration, title, description, and optional action. Used when a list/table is empty or a search returns no results.
whenToUse: Empty state for lists, tables, or search results
Error states with a recovery action
Onboarding screens to introduce empty functionality
After dismissing all items in a queue
whenNotToUse: As decorative content — IllustratedMessage signals state
For inline form validation — use MessageStrip
When data IS present — only show when empty
doRules: Pick an illustration matching the context (NoData / NoTasks / NoFilter / NoActivities)
Provide a one-line title explaining the state
Provide a description suggesting what to do next
Include an action button when the user can recover (Refresh, Create, etc.)
dontRules: Do not show IllustratedMessage if the cause is unclear
Do not use generic illustrations when a specific one exists
Do not omit the action when the user can recover
Do not nest IllustratedMessage inside another IllustratedMessage

layoutGuidance.placement: Place IllustratedMessage inside a compatible container (DynamicPage, Panel, Dialog).
layoutGuidance.sizing: Auto width unless explicitly sized; height matches density (Compact 26-32px, Cozy 36-44px).
layoutGuidance.spacing: 8px gap from adjacent elements; 16px between groups.

contentGuidance.labelLength: See doRules for specific length guidance.

responsiveBehavior.M: May condense or collapse — see Fiori responsive design guidelines.
responsiveBehavior.S: May convert to alternative pattern (Popover, Dialog) on narrow viewports.

accessibilityGuidance.ariaPattern: Maps to ARIA pattern appropriate for feedback — see SAP Fiori a11y docs.
accessibilityGuidance.keyboard: Full keyboard support — Tab to focus, Enter/Space to activate.

exceptions: See pluginNotes for plugin-specific rendering caveats.
